title: Product dashboard initiatives (ideas / PRD-backed)
description: schemaVersion 2.4.0: stable initiative ids prd-{slug}; optional designArtifactUrl / designRevision; prdTier / lane are lifecycle — not encoded in id. Optional Product_ideas frontmatter: prdTier, summary.

executiveContext.description: Optional short bullets or one-liner for Executive view (current focus from steering).

lanes.description: Ordered lane ids (left to right). First lane is Idea (backlog).

kind.description: Orchestration applies to feature ideas only, not operational tasks.

summary.description: Short digest for the card; may come from build template, Product_ideas excerpt, or frontmatter summary.

prdStage.description: none = Idea/Discovery (no vault PRD in modal); draft = Design WIP; spec_ready = full PRD under 06-Resources/PRDs/. Inferred from lane if omitted.

prdTier.description: Stack label: Current / Next / Future / Backlog

designArtifactUrl.description: External design file URL (e.g. Paper); may be merged from browser export.

designRevision.description: Design artifact revision or version label.

contextFile.description: Vault-relative (06-Resources/...) or legacy path relative to product-dashboard/ (e.g. initiatives/foo.md).

progress.description: Optional numeric progress for Executive view

progressLabel.description: Qualitative progress if progress number not set

workflowStatus.description: Optional chip: blocked, ready_for_spec, etc. (PDLC lane remains canonical)

productBrief.description: Optional structured intake (problem, users, success, …). Browser-only ideas store this in localStorage export as productBriefById[id]; not required in repo initiatives.json.
